newMeetingForm.title: 📅 New Forum Meeting
newMeetingForm.error_required: Both date and location are required.
newMeetingForm.error_failed: Failed to create meeting. Please try again.

intro.subtitle: Let's prepare your Monthly Revelation for Forum 11.
intro.principles_text: Everything shared here is strictly confidential. Share experiences — not advice. Be authentic, be present.

section.work_question: How do I feel about what I do?
section.family_question: How do I feel about the people whom I love?
section.me_question: How do I feel about myself?
section.noFeelings: No feelings added yet. Click "Add Feeling" to start.
section.triggered_desc: For each trigger, describe the event or situation. You can group multiple feelings under one trigger.
section.triggered_placeholder_multi: What happened? Describe the event or situation that triggered these feelings…
section.sig_subtitle: Dig into why these feelings and events matter to you.
section.sig_why: Why do they matter to me?
section.sig_realize: What do I realize about myself?
section.sig_realizePlaceholder: A key insight or realization this reflection has brought...

next30.title: Next 30 Days
next30.subtitle: How do I feel about the next 30 days?
next30.feelingsDesc: How do you feel looking forward?
next30.outlookDesc: What's on my mind for the next 30 days?
next30.outlookPlaceholder: Share what's ahead — key events, decisions, opportunities, or worries...

forumExchange.title: Forum Exchange
forumExchange.subtitle: Two final questions to deepen your Forum's connection
forumExchange.learning_title: 💬 Something I could learn from you all
forumExchange.learning_desc: What would you love to get input on from your fellow Forum members?
forumExchange.learning_placeholder: e.g. How do you maintain discipline in building new habits when life gets hectic?...
forumExchange.explore_desc: Something that is important to you. Emotionally complex. Unsettled.
forumExchange.explore_note: This is a topic you want to bring to the Forum for a deeper conversation.
forumExchange.explore_placeholder: e.g. I've been questioning whether the path I'm on still aligns with who I want to become...
